title: Fisheries: consultations between the UK, the EU and Norway for 2026
body: "These agreed records document the outcome of annual consultations between the UK, EU and Norway on opportunities for jointly managed fisheries stocks in 2026.   These consultations promote sustainable management of 7 North Sea jointly managed stocks of fish:    cod  haddock  saithe  whiting  plaice  herring  sprat    There is a separate agreed record of consultations between the EU, Norway and the UK on:    sprat for 1 July 2025 to 30 June 2026    Read this on: Fisheries: consultations between the EU, Norway and the UK for 2025 "
